seo.pageTitle: Seoul City or Suburbs Private 10HR Charter | AtoC Korea
seo.metaDescription: Private 10-hour Seoul-area charter with EN-speaking driver-guide: Gapyeong (Nami, Morning Calm), DMZ + Paju, or Everland + Folk Village. Free Seoul pickup.
seo.title: 首爾私人包車 · 10小時客製近郊行程 | AtoC Korea
seo.description: 首爾或近郊私人包車10小時行程：路線完全客製，南怡島、晨靜苑、楊平、水原等均可安排。持照英語導遊司機，無陌生旅客，飯店接送，人數不限。

catalog_card.title: 首爾市區或近郊私人包車10小時行程
catalog_card.subtitle: Design your own day around Seoul or its suburbs with a private licensed driver-guide.
catalog_card.shortCardDescription: A premium 10-hour private car charter that lets you build your own Seoul-area day. Choose one of three recommended routes—Nami Island + Morning Calm + Petite France + Gangchon Railbike, DMZ + Paju Outlet, or Everland + Korean Folk Village—or send your own itinerary. Free hotel pickup is included for Seoul downtown stays.

headlineLine1: 首爾市區或近郊私人包車

price.priceNote: 費用尚未確認。私人包車定價視車輛大小而異。確認後，AtoC Korea直售價格享9折優惠。

hero.tagline: 以您自己的節奏打造首爾近郊的一天，持照英語導遊全程陪同——路線由您決定

galleryItems.atmosphere: 以現代首爾為靈活起點；私家車飯店接送

itineraryStops.name: Route 1: Gapyeong Nature & Culture Loop
itineraryStops.category: Nami Island + Morning Calm + Petite France + Gangchon Railbike
itineraryStops.description: **首爾近郊私人包車路線1 — 加平自然文化環線**以**南怡島、晨靜樹木園、小法國村**為三大核心，是首爾近郊最具代表性的自然與文化組合路線。南怡島（《冬季戀歌》水杉大道）；晨靜樹木園（韓國最具代表性的私人樹木園，20個主題花園，冬季燈光節每年12月至3月）；小法國村（法式主題村，《來自星星的你》拍攝地）。加平環線是4條首爾近郊私人包車路線中**最適合拍照**的路線，四季各有不同的花卉和景觀主題。行程10小時，費用根據車型和團體人數而定，入場費和餐費另計。
highlights: 南怡島（《冬季戀歌》水杉大道）+ 晨靜樹木園 + 小法國村
**最適合拍照的首爾近郊私人包車路線**
晨靜樹木園：20個主題花園，冬季燈光節12月至3月
小法國村：法式主題村，《來自星星的你》拍攝地
四季各有不同的花卉和景觀主題
10小時私人包車服務
入場費和餐費另計
適合喜愛拍照和自然景觀的旅客
從首爾市中心出發，車程約1小時
timeUsed: Seoul hotel pickup ~08:00-09:00, ~70-90 min transfer to Gapyeong
Morning: Nami Island (2-3 hours) OR Gangchon Rail Bike (90 min) — typically choose one
Lunch in Cheongpyeong town or Petite France entrance area (dak-galbi spicy chicken is the local specialty)
Afternoon: Petite France (1.5-2 hours) + Garden of Morning Calm (1.5-2 hours, plus light festival in winter if staying past sunset)
Return to Seoul ~18:00-20:00 (later in winter for the lighting festival)
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **首次遊首爾、希望以低步行量獲得高Instagram回報的自然＋拍攝之日的最強路線**。四個景點彼此相距僅15至20分鐘，每個景點的入場費在₩1,000至₩13,000之間，路線緊湊；與DMZ路線不同，不受軍事時間表影響，全年可行。春季賞花、秋季紅葉及冬季燈光節（晨靜樹木園12月至3月）讓加平路線在四季均有明確主題。

visitBasics.hours: Nami Island: 07:30-21:00 daily; Garden of Morning Calm: 08:30-19:00 standard, 11:00-21:00/23:00 during winter lighting festival; Petite France: 09:00-18:00 (last entry 17:00); Rail Bike: 09:00-17:30 with timed slots
visitBasics.closed: All open year-round; Petite France closes some Mondays in off-season
visitBasics.admission: Nami 18,000 / Morning Calm 11,000 / Petite France 12,000 / Rail Bike ~30,000-35,000 per bike (1-4 people). Driver-guide assists with ticket purchase.
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — Nami Island walking loop is ~3 km flat; Morning Calm 1.5-2 hours of garden paths; Petite France gentle slopes between buildings

smartNotes.photo: Nami's Metasequoia avenue and Ginkgo lane are the iconic shots; Petite France's pastel houses against the green mountains; Morning Calm during the December-March lighting festival post-sunset is the absolute signature.
smartNotes.facilities: Nami Island has multiple cafés and a hanok-style restaurant on site; Petite France has snack stalls only (eat lunch elsewhere); Morning Calm's Food Garden serves Korean comfort food.
smartNotes.tip: If visiting in December-March, time the route to arrive at Morning Calm by 16:00 so you see the daytime garden first, then stay through illumination (~17:00 onward). Pre-book Rail Bike slots — they sell out on weekends.

_poi_meta.note: Route option for private charter — represents a multi-POI Gapyeong-cluster bundle (Nami, Morning Calm, Petite France, Gangchon Railbike). Garden of Morning Calm and Petite France verified in KB v1.10. Nami Island will receive its dedicated KB entry in Batch 8 alongside the standalone Nami tour. Gangchon Rail Bike is a single-use experience without a standalone KB entry.

itineraryStops.name: Route 2: DMZ History & Paju Shopping
itineraryStops.description: **首爾近郊私人包車路線2 — DMZ歷史與坡州購物**以**DMZ非武裝地帶歷史參觀和坡州出版城購物**為雙核心，提供深度認識朝鮮半島分裂歷史和現代文化創意的完整體驗。典型路線涵蓋：臨津閣和平公園（自由橋、風車丘）；坡州英語村或赫理農場（可選）；坡州出版城（韓國最大的出版和設計社區）；以及Provence Village（歐式主題村）。DMZ路線是4條路線中**歷史意義最深遠**的選項，同時融合了輕鬆的購物和咖啡廳體驗。行程10小時，費用根據車型和團體人數而定，入場費和餐費另計。部分DMZ景點需提前預約。
highlights: 臨津閣和平公園（自由橋、望拜壇、千瘡百孔蒸汽機車）
坡州出版城 — 韓國最大的出版和設計社區
**歷史意義最深遠的首爾近郊私人包車路線**
坡州英語村或赫理農場（可選體驗活動）
Provence Village（歐式主題村）
10小時私人包車服務
入場費和餐費另計
部分DMZ景點需提前預約
適合對朝鮮半島歷史有興趣的旅客
timeUsed: Seoul hotel pickup ~08:00, ~70 min transfer to Imjingak
Morning: Imjingak + 3rd Tunnel + Dora Observatory + Dorasan Station (~3-4 hours)
Lunch break (Paju local pork-belly BBQ or Munsan-area Korean restaurant)
Afternoon: Paju Premium Outlets + optional Lotte Premium Outlets across the road (~3-4 hours)
Return to Seoul by ~18:00-19:00
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **希望深入體驗韓戰∕南北韓關係歷史，而無需承受標準JSA行程的嚴格時間表和大巴節奏的旅客的最強路線**。私人包車意味著您可以在板門店∕統一展望台的某個陣列停留更長時間，而不是被趕上巴士。坡州Premium Outlets作為下午的壓力釋放站，使此組合成為既有深度又有購物的罕見配對——通常是有歷史意識的旅客和陪同者雙方都滿意的折衷之選。

visitBasics.hours: DMZ stops 09:00-17:00 (last entry 15:30 most stops); Paju Premium Outlets 10:30-21:00 daily
visitBasics.closed: DMZ tour areas closed Mondays + when military operations require; Paju Outlets open year-round
visitBasics.admission: DMZ Combined Ticket ~12,000 KRW (3rd Tunnel + Dora Observatory + Dorasan Station); Paju Outlets free entry. Passport required at DMZ entry — driver-guide assists.
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — 3rd Tunnel descent is the most physically demanding section (steep 73 m ramp; monorail option ~9,000 KRW return); Paju Outlets are flat outdoor walking shopping center

convenience.restroom: Available at all DMZ stops and at Paju Outlets food courts
convenience.parking: Driver-guide handles all parking; DMZ has dedicated tour-bus lots

smartNotes.photo: Dora Observatory's high-zoom telescopes for the North Korea views; Freedom Bridge with its colorful prayer ribbons; the 1953 rusting locomotive at Imjingak — none photograph the inside of the 3rd Tunnel (cameras prohibited).
smartNotes.facilities: Lunch is best in Paju city (between DMZ and Outlets) — Paju is famous for grilled pork belly (samgyeopsal). DMZ-area food is limited and tourist-priced.
smartNotes.tip: Bring passports — required for DMZ entry. The 3rd Tunnel ramp is the bottleneck for low-mobility travelers — the monorail option (9,000 KRW return) covers the same descent without the steep walk. DMZ tours run on operational schedules so the driver-guide will confirm available stops the morning of the tour.

_poi_meta.note: Route option for private charter — DMZ-related POIs (Imjingak, 3rd Tunnel, Dora Observatory, Dorasan) will receive their dedicated KB entries in Batch 8 alongside the standalone DMZ tour (seoul-dmz-private-3rd-tunnel-suspension-bridge). Paju Premium Outlets does not get a standalone KB entry (single-use shopping stop). Facts above are verified via VisitKorea and DMZ tour operator pages.

itineraryStops.name: Route 3: Everland + Korean Folk Village
itineraryStops.description: **首爾近郊私人包車路線3 — 愛寶樂園 + 韓國民俗村**是4條路線中**最適合家庭旅遊**的選項，結合了韓國最大的主題樂園和最具代表性的傳統民俗村。愛寶樂園（에버랜드）是韓國最大的主題樂園，設有多個主題區、刺激遊樂設施和季節性花卉活動（春季鬱金香節、夏季水上樂園、秋季南瓜節、冬季雪橇節）；韓國民俗村（한국민속촌，龍仁）是韓國第一座露天民俗文化博物館，260多棟傳統房屋，每日農樂、走鋼絲（UNESCO非物質文化遺產）等傳統表演。行程10小時，費用根據車型和團體人數而定，入場費和餐費另計。
highlights: 愛寶樂園 — 韓國最大主題樂園，多個主題區 + 季節性節慶活動
韓國民俗村 — 第一座露天民俗文化博物館，260多棟傳統房屋
每日傳統表演：農樂、走鋼絲（UNESCO非物質文化遺產）、馬上武術
**最適合家庭旅遊的首爾近郊私人包車路線**
四季節慶活動：春季鬱金香、夏季水上樂園、秋季南瓜、冬季雪橇
10小時私人包車服務
入場費和餐費另計
適合攜帶兒童的家庭和喜愛主題樂園的旅客
從首爾市中心出發，車程約1小時
timeUsed: Seoul hotel pickup ~08:30, ~50-70 min transfer to Yongin
Option A — Everland-only: full day at the park (9-10 hours typical for a complete visit)
Option B — Folk Village-only: 4-5 hours including 2-3 performances, then return to Seoul
Option C — Hybrid (rare): Folk Village morning (3-4 hours) + Everland afternoon (4-5 hours) — only feasible if skipping Caribbean Bay water park and most of Zootopia
Return to Seoul by ~18:30-19:30
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **攜帶6至15歲孩子的家庭、主題公園愛好者，以及希望深度玩一個地點而非多點走馬看花的旅客的最強路線**。愛寶樂園本身通常需要8至10小時——私人包車讓您可以選擇自己的抵達時間，不受固定出發的限制；駕駛在您玩樂時等候，讓您完全掌控節奏。對於想在首爾附近花一整天的家庭而言，愛寶樂園＋韓國民俗村的龍仁組合最大程度減少了車程。

visitBasics.hours: Everland: 10:00-22:00 weekdays, 09:30-22:00 weekends/holidays (varies seasonally); Korean Folk Village: Mon-Thu 10:00-18:00, Fri-Sun 10:00-22:00
visitBasics.admission: Everland adult 1-day 54,000-64,000 KRW (20% foreigner discount at gate; Klook discounts often available); Korean Folk Village adult 37,000 KRW (Visit Korea official). Driver-guide assists with ticket purchase.
visitBasics.walking: High at Everland (5-10 km easily — large hilly park) — Korean Folk Village is high too (5-7 km on flat dirt/gravel paths)

convenience.parking: Driver-guide handles all parking; both have dedicated paid lots (Folk Village 2,000 KRW car / 3,000 SUV)

smartNotes.photo: Everland — T Express drop and the seasonal Tulip Festival (Mar-Apr) Romantic Tower Tree (26 m flower sculpture); Folk Village — yangban two-story house with autumn ginkgo (last two weeks of October); Jultagi tightrope show with audience; Joseon wedding reenactment.
smartNotes.facilities: Everland: Smart Queue (free, in-app reservation system) is essential before 14:00 for T Express, Lost Valley, Safari World, Panda World — register the moment you enter the park. Folk Village: traditional street market food is the on-site option (Imsil cheese pizza, railroad hot dogs).
smartNotes.tip: Pick ONE primary destination — Everland or Folk Village — at booking; trying to do both leaves both feeling rushed. Pair Folk Village with Suwon Hwaseong Fortress (UNESCO, 15-20 min) for a coherent Joseon-themed half-day if you take Option B. For Everland, mid-week visits during peak season have materially shorter queues.

_poi_meta.note: Route option for private charter — represents a Yongin-area bundle (Everland + Korean Folk Village). Both POIs are verified in KB v1.10.

itineraryStops.name: Route 4: Custom Itinerary Option
itineraryStops.description: **首爾近郊私人包車路線4 — 客製行程選項**是完全自由的10小時個人化首爾近郊之旅——司機導遊依照**您自行選擇的景點清單**安排行程。您可以選擇任何組合：水原華城城郭（UNESCO世界遺產）、加平自然景觀（南怡島、晨靜樹木園）、DMZ歷史（臨津閣）、宗教文化（水原光教山寺廟群）、韓劇拍攝地（龍仁、坡州）、購物（坡州出版城、京畿道廣場）或任何您希望探索的地點。司機導遊會提供景點之間的最佳路線建議，並根據您的節奏和天氣狀況靈活調整。10小時私人包車服務，費用根據車型和團體人數而定；入場費和餐費另計。
highlights: 完全自由的10小時個人化首爾近郊之旅
自行選擇任何景點的組合
可選：水原華城、加平、DMZ、韓劇拍攝地、購物等任意組合
司機導遊提供景點之間的最佳路線建議
根據您的節奏和天氣狀況靈活調整
**10小時私人包車服務**；費用根據車型和團體人數而定
入場費和餐費另計
適合有特定興趣或希望自由探索的旅客
可事先與司機導遊確認行程計劃
timeUsed: Send your plan with the booking confirmation 24-48 hours ahead so the driver-guide can pre-clear traffic and operating-hour conflicts
Driver-guide sequences to avoid Seoul rush hours (07:00-09:00 inbound, 17:00-20:00 outbound) and individual stop closure days
Return to your hotel within the 10-hour window (overage by prior agreement)
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: **四個選項中最靈活的一個**。最適合首爾回頭客、有特定興趣（K-pop、韓劇、攝影、美食、親子、歷史深度）的旅客，以及4至9人團體（在此規模下，每輛車的定價相比私人拼團更具競爭力）。客製行程選項允許將三條預設路線的元素混搭——例如：加平自然＋一個DMZ停留——或完全按照自己的景點清單來安排，前提是在10小時窗口內可行。

visitBasics.admission: All admission fees pay directly; driver-guide assists at each gate

smartNotes.photo: Send 3-5 reference photos to the driver-guide in advance — it dramatically improves the quality of your final shot list
smartNotes.facilities: Lunch is your call — communicate dietary needs (halal, vegetarian, no-seafood, kids' menu) at booking so the guide can suggest appropriate restaurants
smartNotes.tip: For same-day-flight passengers: state your flight time at booking; the route will be sequenced to drop you at Incheon Airport ~3 hours before departure. Heyri Art Valley (Paju) and Suwon Hwaseong are the strongest single 'extra' stops most visitors don't plan for and most enjoy.

_poi_meta.note: Fully customizable route option — candidate POIs include both Batch 7 KB additions and POIs reserved for batches 8-9. Final stop list determined by passenger's request at booking.

routeShapeIntro.title: 行程動線總覽
routeShapeIntro.subtitle: Pickup at your Seoul downtown hotel, then a fully flexible 10-hour day shaped by you and your driver-guide. Choose one of three recommended routes—Gapyeong nature, DMZ + Paju, or Everland + Folk Village—or send your own itinerary.

bestFor: 攜帶幼兒的家庭，包括年幼小孩
希望量身訂製全日行程的回頭客
重視舒適、私密和彈性的旅客

routeLogicSections.title: 私人包車在彈性上的優勢

items.label: 按您的節奏，而非團隊的節奏
items.detail: 在您喜愛的景點多停留，跳過不感興趣的，隨時調整行程，無需等候其他旅客集合。

items.label: 門到門的舒適體驗
items.detail: 首爾市中心免費飯店接送，省去清晨地鐵換乘和深夜接駁車的壓力。

items.label: 司機兼導遊的在地洞察
items.detail: 持牌韓國司機兼導遊提供在地脈絡，推薦餐廳，並即時根據天氣或交通調整路線。

items.label: 路線1——首次遊覽的最佳風景體驗
items.detail: 若您想要一天充實的韓國自然與韓劇取景地，加平環線涵蓋最受情侶和家庭喜愛的標誌性景點。

items.label: 路線2——歷史深度與購物的完美平衡
items.detail: 若您既想深度體驗又想輕鬆購物，DMZ＋坡州組合尤其適合成人旅客和歷史愛好者。

items.label: 路線3——親子家庭的主題公園之選
items.detail: 若您的團體有想乘坐遊樂設施的孩子，愛寶樂園和韓國民俗村的龍仁組合最大程度減少車程。

items.label: 進出首爾的交通狀況
items.detail: 週五和週日下午返程可能增加30至60分鐘；司機兼導遊將相應調整最後一個停留點。

items.label: 跨省目的地需額外費用
items.detail: 羊駝世界和樂高樂園（均在江原道）需加收₩60,000跨省費用，現金支付給司機。

items.label: 超時服務
items.detail: 若您需要超過10小時，超時費用為每小時₩30,000，以現金支付給司機，視司機排班而定。

lessIdealFor: 獨遊預算旅客（私人定價按車計，非按人計）
希望與其他旅客共乘以增加社交體驗的旅客
需要固定時間表、有解說的拼團行程的旅客
希望含所有入場費和餐費的旅客

practicalAccordionItems.title: 接送與下車地點
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 首爾市中心飯店免費接送，大廳提早10分鐘等候
content: 首爾市中心地區（明洞、弘大、東大門、仁寺洞、梨泰院等）的飯店提供免費接送。
首爾市中心以外的住宿可能需要額外接送費用。
請在約定出發時間前10分鐘在飯店大廳等候。
返回時可在您的首爾飯店或任何您選擇的首爾市中心地點下車。
仁川機場接送可加收₩100,000單程附加費。
如需改期，請至少在原預訂日期前2天告知。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 車輛與人數限制
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 車輛依團體人數及行李量配置
content: 車輛類型依乘客人數及行李件數精準配置。
預訂時請填寫確切的乘客人數及行李件數。
典型配置：1至3位賓客用轎車、4至5位賓客用中型SUV、6至9位賓客用Staria或Carnival廂型車。
10人以上大型團體可安排多輛車或另行報價。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 10小時行程與延時收費
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 從接送起嚴格執行10小時服務窗口
content: 10小時窗口從您的飯店接送時間開始計算。
如已加購機場接送，亦包含在同一10小時內。
超時費用為每小時₩30,000，直接以現金支付給司機。
超時需視司機排班及適用服務時數規定而定。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 需知額外費用
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 跨省、機場接送及入場費另計
content: 羊駝世界或樂高樂園（江原道）：跨省附加費₩60,000，現金支付給司機。
仁川機場接送：單程附加費₩100,000。
所有入場費、餐費及個人購物費用均由賓客自行支付。
司機小費為自願性質，全日服務後適當致謝不勝感激。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 天候政策
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 私人包車格式對天氣變化適應力強
content: 雨天：司機兼導遊可轉向室內景點（博物館、坡州Premium Outlets、Heyri藝術村）。
大雪可能關閉江原道冬季路線。
DMZ入場可能受軍事訓練時間表影響，可能需要當日路線調整。
最終路線調整在當天與司機兼導遊共同確認。

practicalAccordionItems.title: 費用包含項目
practicalAccordionItems.preview: 含車輛及持牌司機兼導遊；入場費及餐費自費
content: 私家車（轎車、SUV或廂型車，依團體人數）
持牌英語司機兼導遊
首爾市中心飯店免費接送
標準路線的油費及過路費
所有入場費不含，在各景點自行支付
餐費不含
個人購物費用不含
司機小費不含

practicalWeatherStatic._seasonalSummary: 首爾四季分明。路線因地而異：加平比首爾涼爽；DMZ冬季極寒；愛寶樂園龍仁地區與首爾相近。

seasonalVariations.title: Best for blossoms
seasonalVariations.description: 首爾和加平各處賞櫻；晨靜樹木園進入木蓮和杜鵑盛開期。

seasonalVariations.title: Long days
seasonalVariations.description: 長日照延伸10小時窗口；預期潮濕及六、七月可能的梅雨。

seasonalVariations.title: Best photo season
seasonalVariations.description: 韓國最強的景觀季節；南怡島、晨靜樹木園和韓國民俗村均呈現最美拍攝效果。

seasonalVariations.title: Lighting Festival season
seasonalVariations.description: 晨靜樹木園舉辦著名燈光節（12月至3月中旬）；DMZ冬季極為寒冷且暴露在外。

bookingTrustItems.description: 持牌韓國旅遊運營商，備有完整保險
bookingTrustItems.body: 持牌韓國旅遊運營商，備有完整保險

bookingTrustItems.body: 車輛大小精準匹配您的團體需求

bookingSupportSteps.detail: 您將收到含行程摘要的預訂確認通知。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 您將收到含行程摘要的預訂確認通知。

bookingSupportSteps.title: 出發前12小時提醒
bookingSupportSteps.detail: 出發前分享天氣更新及任何路線調整。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 出發前分享天氣更新及任何路線調整。

bookingSupportSteps.detail: 確認確切接送時間及司機聯絡方式。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 確認確切接送時間及司機聯絡方式。

bookingSupportSteps.title: 當日路線說明
bookingSupportSteps.detail: 出發當天早上根據最新現場狀況提供簡報。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 出發當天早上根據最新現場狀況提供簡報。

bookingSupportSteps.detail: 每個景點提供即時現場導覽。
bookingSupportSteps.description: 每個景點提供即時現場導覽。

bookingSupportSteps.detail: 行程結束後提供後續建議及額外資訊。

staticQuestions.question: 這與南怡島或DMZ的小團體巴士行程有何不同？
staticQuestions.answer: 這是僅供您的團體使用的私家車——靈活行程、飯店接送、無需配合他人時間表。小團體巴士行程在多個團體間遵循固定時間。若您需要飯店接送、客製路線組合（加平自然＋DMZ＋愛寶樂園或自訂清單）或適合長輩和幼兒的節奏，請選擇私人包車。若您是1至2人且以預算為優先，固定路線拼團行程更為划算——私人定價是按車計，而非按人計。

staticQuestions.question: 10小時窗口如何運作？
staticQuestions.answer: 計時從您的首爾飯店接送時間開始，連續計算至返回下車——包含車程、停留時間，以及如已加購的機場接送。超過10小時的費用為每小時₩30,000，以現金支付給司機，並視司機排班而定。建議在當天早晨或前一晚與司機兼導遊確認行程優先事項。

staticQuestions.question: 下雨天怎麼辦？
staticQuestions.answer: 司機兼導遊會在雨天轉向室內景點——坡州Premium Outlets、Heyri藝術村、博物館停留或水原星野Shopping Mall。路線2的DMZ部分也可能受軍事訓練時間表影響，可能需要當日路線調整。最終路線在當天早晨根據現場天氣與司機兼導遊共同確認。

staticQuestions.question: 我會乘坐什麼車型？
staticQuestions.answer: 車輛在預訂時依您的團體人數及行李量配置。典型配置：1至3位賓客用轎車、4至5位賓客用中型SUV、6至9位賓客用現代Staria或起亞Carnival廂型車。預訂時請提供確切人數及行李件數。10人以上團體可安排多輛車報價。

staticQuestions.question: 有哪些額外費用需要了解？
staticQuestions.answer: 跨省附加費：羊駝世界或樂高樂園（均在江原道）需加收₩60,000。仁川機場接送為單程₩100,000。所有入場費及餐費均由賓客在各景點自行支付（不含在行程費用中）。司機小費為自願性質，全日服務後適當致謝不勝感激。

staticQuestions.question: 哪些首爾地區享有免費飯店接送？
staticQuestions.answer: 免費接送涵蓋首爾市中心核心地帶：明洞、弘大、東大門、仁寺洞、梨泰院及鄰近地區。此區域以外的住宿（如江南陽才以東、金浦機場附近、麻浦遠西）可能需要小額附加接送費——預訂時確認。請在預訂時提供飯店地址，以便司機提前規劃路線。

staticQuestions.question: 對於初次遊覽首爾及近郊的旅客，這是好選擇嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 適合，但有一點說明：此格式最適合對三條預設路線（加平自然環線、DMZ＋坡州、愛寶樂園＋民俗村）之一有明確偏好或有特定景點想法的旅客。沒有特定想法的初次旅客有時從固定路線小團體行程中獲益更多，因為路線已替您決定好。若您尚未決定，司機兼導遊可在當天早晨建議路線。

staticQuestions.question: 步行難度高嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 大多以輕鬆步行為主——這是以車輛為主的行程，司機會在每個景點附近下客。步行需求視路線而定：南怡島有平坦林蔭步道（約2公里環島）；晨靜樹木園有緩坡；DMZ景點在第3條地下隧道和臨津閣有些許不平整路面。愛寶樂園和民俗村步行較多，但司機等候，您自行掌控節奏。

staticQuestions.question: 這個行程適合家庭嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 適合——這是首爾近郊格式中對家庭最友善的選擇之一。私家車省去了嬰兒車和兒童座椅的巴士協調問題，司機兼導遊可在小憩或孩子疲憊時暫停或轉向。路線3（愛寶樂園＋韓國民俗村）是最強的家庭選擇；路線1（加平）適合大一點的孩子；路線2（DMZ）僅適合青少年及以上。

staticQuestions.question: 年長者可以舒適地參加嗎？
staticQuestions.answer: 是的——這是最適合年長旅客的格式之一。私家車、飯店接送和彈性節奏讓活躍年長者及行動較不便的長輩都能舒適參與。司機兼導遊可依要求在更靠近入口處下客、安排休息座位，並略過上坡可選路段（如普蒂法國山坡、天空公園螺旋梯）。預訂時請告知具體的行動限制，以便調整路線。

staticQuestions.question: 建議的最低參加年齡是多少？
staticQuestions.answer: 所有年齡均歡迎。私家車、彈性節奏和飯店接送讓此格式成為首爾日行程中對幼兒最友善的選擇之一——如需兒童安全座椅請提前準備（司機可提供建議）。路線3（愛寶樂園＋韓國民俗村）是預設中最適合家庭的選擇。對於學步兒童，司機兼導遊可安排額外休息時間，不影響您的行程。

sticky_booking_bar.note: checkout_tour_id resolves at runtime from Supabase / env; not part of static JSONB.

meeting_points.name: 首爾市中心各飯店大廳
meeting_points.note: Door-to-door pickup at any hotel within the supported area.

meeting_points.name: Incheon Airport (optional)
meeting_points.note: Incheon and Gimpo airport pickups available on request; counts inside the 10-hour window.

dropoff_points.name: Any central Seoul hotel
dropoff_points.note: Drop-off at the same hotel or any address within the supported area.

dropoff_points.name: Incheon Airport (optional)
dropoff_points.note: Same-day departure drop-off available; counts inside the service window.

pickup_dropoff.notes: 首爾市中心地區（明洞、弘大、東大門、仁寺洞、梨泰院等）飯店免費接送。請在約定出發時間前10分鐘在大廳等候。仁川機場接送可加收₩100,000附加費。

walking_notes: Walking load depends entirely on the chosen route.
Route 1 (Gapyeong loop) is moderate, with the most walking at Nami Island and the Garden of Morning Calm.
Route 2 (DMZ + Paju) includes a steep descent at the 3rd Tunnel, which is the most demanding section across all routes.
Route 3 (Everland + Folk Village) is highest in cumulative walking due to theme-park movement.
The driver-guide can adjust pacing on the day to match family or senior comfort.

matching_metadata.note: Scores were tuned for a fully customizable 10-hour private charter format. Comfort, flexibility, mobility-friendliness, and family fit score very high because the private format eliminates group constraints. Value-for-money and budget fit score lower because the private format is per-vehicle rather than per-person. Walking and culture levels reflect a weighted average across the three recommended routes; the on-the-day load can move significantly depending on the chosen route.

score_rationale.private_fit: Direct match: this is a per-vehicle private charter.
score_rationale.mobility_friendly_fit: Private car door-to-door eliminates most public-transport mobility friction; only the DMZ 3rd Tunnel (Route 2) reduces friendliness if chosen.
score_rationale.young_kids_fit: Best-in-class for kids because car seats, stops, and pacing are all adjustable.
score_rationale.weather_sensitivity: Low because the driver-guide can shift the route toward indoor stops on bad-weather days.
score_rationale.value_for_money_fit: Mid: per-vehicle pricing is excellent value for groups of 4 to 9 but expensive for solo travelers.
score_rationale.culture_level: Moderate weighted average; the chosen route can push it to 5 (Folk Village + DMZ) or 3 (Gapyeong loop).
score_rationale.rain_fit: Above-average because Paju Outlets, Heyri, and Korean Folk Village indoor sections give strong wet-weather alternatives.

anchor_pois: Seoul greater area (Gapyeong, DMZ, Paju, custom)

hero.tagline: Build your own Seoul-area day at your own pace, with a licensed driver-guide and a private vehicle for up to 10 hours.

galleryItems.alt: Seoul city skyline with Lotte World Tower and Han River visible at dusk, viewed from a south-Seoul vantage
galleryItems.caption: Seoul skyline — flexible departure point
galleryItems.atmosphere: Modern Seoul as the flexible starting point; private vehicle hotel pickup

galleryItems.alt: Nami Island's tree-lined metasequoia path with travelers walking under tall trees on a wide gravel walkway
galleryItems.caption: Nami Island metasequoia path — Route 1 highlight
galleryItems.atmosphere: Tree-lined paths and short ferry crossing; Winter Sonata K-drama filming location

galleryItems.alt: Garden of Morning Calm's themed flower beds with seasonal blooms and curving stone walking paths
galleryItems.caption: Garden of Morning Calm — Route 1 photo stop
galleryItems.location: Garden of Morning Calm, Gapyeong (Route 1 option)
galleryItems.atmosphere: 20 themed gardens across 330,000 m²; founded 1996 by Han Sang-kyung

galleryItems.alt: Petite France village with brightly colored Mediterranean-style houses on a hillside in Gapyeong
galleryItems.caption: Petite France — Le Petit Prince village (Route 1)
galleryItems.atmosphere: Colorful hillside village; My Love from the Star K-drama filming location

galleryItems.alt: DMZ Imjingak Peace Park with the Bridge of Freedom visible behind the monument area near Paju
galleryItems.caption: Imjingak Peace Park — Route 2 anchor
galleryItems.atmosphere: Korea's most historically charged border park; Bridge of Freedom (1953); 7 km from MDL

itineraryStops.name: Route 1: Gapyeong Nature & Culture Loop
itineraryStops.category: Nami Island + Morning Calm + Petite France + Gangchon Railbike
itineraryStops.description: A scenic Gapyeong-area circuit covering Nami Island's tree-lined paths, the themed Garden of Morning Calm, the Le Petit Prince-themed Petite France, and the rail-bike experience along old Gangchon railway tracks. The most photo-friendly of the three recommended routes.
highlights: Four iconic Korean drama filming locations in one day
Strong seasonal visual variety (cherry blossoms, fall foliage, Winter Light Festival)
Ferry, garden walks, themed village, and rail bike in one route
Best route for couples and family travelers
timeUsed: Drive from Seoul (about 1 to 1.5 hours each way)
Time at each of the four stops, balanced by traveler preference
Lunch break in Gapyeong area (free choice)
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: It is the highest-photo-value of the recommended routes and the most balanced for travelers who want scenery, light culture, and one active stop in a single day.

visitBasics.hours: Stops typically open 08:30 to 18:00; Garden of Morning Calm extends to 21:00 during the winter Lighting Festival
visitBasics.closed: Most stops open year-round; rail-bike weather sensitive
visitBasics.admission: Pay directly: Nami Island ≈16,000 KRW, Garden of Morning Calm 11,000 KRW, Petite France 12,000 KRW, Gangchon Railbike from ≈18,000 KRW

smartNotes.photo: Autumn foliage and the winter Lighting Festival at Garden of Morning Calm are the strongest seasonal photo windows.
smartNotes.facilities: Good visitor support at all four stops; lunch options strongest near Gapyeong Wharf and the Garden.
smartNotes.tip: Because the route covers four stops in a Gapyeong loop, request to start by 09:00 to avoid feeling rushed.

_poi_meta.note: Route option — Gapyeong Nature & Culture Loop multi-POI bundle

itineraryStops.name: Route 2: DMZ History & Paju Shopping
itineraryStops.description: A history-and-shopping pairing: the morning visits the DMZ area near Paju (Imjingak Peace Park, 3rd Infiltration Tunnel, Dora Observatory), and the afternoon shifts to Paju Premium Outlets for a relaxed retail close.
highlights: Korea's most historically charged border in the morning
Premium-brand outlet shopping in the afternoon
Strong contrast between heavy history and light retail
Passport required for the DMZ portion
timeUsed: Drive from Seoul (about 70 minutes)
DMZ Peace Tour shuttle (3rd Tunnel + Dora Observatory)
Lunch and transfer to Paju Outlets
Afternoon shopping at Paju Premium Outlets
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: It is the route that best balances Korea's modern history with a relaxed retail close, and works especially well for adult travelers who want both meaning and downtime in one day.

visitBasics.hours: DMZ Peace Tour shuttle operates roughly 09:30 to 15:00; Paju Outlets typically 10:30 to 21:00
visitBasics.closed: DMZ closed Mondays for the 3rd Tunnel route (2nd Tunnel may be visited instead); always passport-required
visitBasics.admission: DMZ Peace Tour shuttle ticket pay directly (≈14,000 to 16,000 KRW); outlets free
visitBasics.walking: Moderate to challenging at the 3rd Tunnel due to a steep descent

convenience.restroom: Available at Imjingak, Dora Observatory, and the outlets

smartNotes.photo: Dora Observatory and Imjingak Park are stronger photo points than the tunnel interior, where photography is restricted.
smartNotes.facilities: Imjingak is the strongest food and rest hub in the morning; Paju Outlets has full retail amenities.
smartNotes.tip: Bring your passport. Without it, you cannot enter the DMZ portion of the route.

_poi_meta.note: Route option — DMZ History & Paju Shopping multi-POI bundle

itineraryStops.name: Route 3: Everland + Korean Folk Village
itineraryStops.description: A family-friendly contrast day pairing Everland, Korea's largest theme park, with the Korean Folk Village in Yongin, a living-heritage open-air museum showing Joseon-era life and traditional performances.
highlights: Korea's largest and most-visited theme park
Living traditional village with daily performances
Strongest route for families with children
Both stops located in Yongin, minimizing transit
timeUsed: Drive from Seoul (about 1 hour)
Half-day at Everland (rides and themed zones)
Lunch transfer
Afternoon at Korean Folk Village (performances and traditional houses)
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: It is the family-best of the three recommended routes, combining a high-energy theme park with a calmer cultural close, both within a single Yongin loop.

visitBasics.admission: Adult 32,000 KRW / Teen 26,000 KRW / Child 22,000 KRW (Integrated ticket including amusement rides; Folk Village only ≈22,000 KRW adult)
visitBasics.walking: Moderate — large grounds (≈2 hours of walking); paths are flat to gently sloping

smartNotes.photo: Traditional performances at the central plaza (esp. equestrian shows) are highlights; thatched-roof houses photograph well in autumn
smartNotes.facilities: Multiple traditional Korean restaurants on site; gift shops with handicrafts
smartNotes.tip: Performances run on a published schedule — check website to time arrivals around the equestrian show; pair with Hwaseong Fortress for a full Suwon-Yongin day

itineraryStops.name: Custom Itinerary Option
itineraryStops.description: Beyond the three recommended routes, you can send your own itinerary in advance. Possible Seoul suburbs locations include Incheon City, Woongjin Playdoci, Swiss Village, Heyri Art Village, Herb Garden, and more. Gangwon-do destinations such as Alpaca World, Seoraksan, Pyeongchang, and Daegwallyeong Sheep Ranch are also possible with extra province-crossing fees.
highlights: Build a route that fits your group exactly
Driver-guide can advise on timing and pacing
Mix Seoul city stops with one suburb stop, or do a full day-trip loop
Province-crossing destinations available with extra fee
timeUsed: Discuss your plan with the driver-guide at pickup
Adjust pacing on the day based on traffic and conditions
Return to your hotel within the 10-hour window
itineraryStops.whyOnRoute: It is the most flexible option of the four. It works best for repeat visitors, travelers with niche interests, or families who want a tailored mix of Seoul-city plus one Gapyeong or Yongin stop.

convenience.restroom: Driver-guide will plan around stop facilities

smartNotes.photo: Custom routes can target specific seasonal photo windows (cherry blossoms in Yeouido, autumn foliage in Bukhansan, winter lights in Gapyeong).
smartNotes.facilities: Discuss meal timing and rest stops with your driver-guide before departure.
smartNotes.tip: Send your itinerary draft at least a few days before the tour so the driver-guide can flag any timing or access issues.

routeShapeIntro.title: How this private day moves
routeShapeIntro.subtitle: Pickup at your Seoul downtown hotel, then a fully flexible 10-hour day shaped by you and your driver-guide. Choose one of three recommended routes—Gapyeong nature, DMZ + Paju, or Everland + Folk Village—or send your own itinerary.

bestFor: Families with children, including very young kids
Couples on honeymoon or anniversary trips
Repeat visitors who want a tailored day
Travelers prioritizing comfort, privacy, and flexibility

routeLogicSections.title: Why a private charter wins on flexibility

items.label: Your pace, not a group's
items.detail: Stay longer at the spots you love, skip the ones you don't, and adjust on the fly without waiting for other guests to regroup.

items.label: Door-to-door comfort
items.detail: Free hotel pickup and drop-off in Seoul downtown means no early-morning subway transfers and no late-evening shuttle stress.

items.label: Driver-guide insight
items.detail: A licensed Korean driver-guide adds local context, recommends meal stops, and adapts the route to weather or traffic in real time.

routeLogicSections.title: How to choose between the routes

items.label: Route 1 for first-time scenic value
items.detail: If you want one strong day of Korean nature and K-drama spots, the Gapyeong loop covers the most beloved tourist landmarks for couples and families.

items.label: Route 2 for history-and-shopping balance
items.detail: If you want meaning plus downtime, the DMZ-and-Paju pairing works especially well for adult travelers and history-curious guests.

items.label: Route 3 for theme-park families
items.detail: If your group includes kids who want rides, the Everland and Korean Folk Village combination minimizes drive time inside Yongin.

items.label: Traffic into and out of Seoul
items.detail: Friday and Sunday afternoons can add 30 to 60 minutes to return time; the driver-guide will adjust your last stop accordingly.

items.label: Province-crossing destinations cost extra
items.detail: Alpaca World and Legoland (both in Gangwon-do) carry an additional 60,000 KRW province-crossing fee paid in cash to the driver.

items.label: Overtime is possible
items.detail: If you need more than 10 hours, an extra hour is 30,000 KRW paid in cash to the driver, subject to driver availability.

lessIdealFor: Solo budget travelers (private pricing is per vehicle)
Travelers who want to mix with other guests for a social experience
Anyone needing a fixed, narrated group tour with set timing
Travelers wanting fully included admission and meals

practicalAccordionItems.title: Pickup & drop-off
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Free Seoul downtown hotel pickup; lobby meeting 10 minutes early
content: Free hotel pickup is included for Seoul downtown areas (Myeongdong, Hongdae, Dongdaemun, Insadong, Itaewon, etc.)
Stays outside Seoul downtown may incur an additional pickup fee
Please wait at the hotel lobby 10 minutes before the agreed departure time
Drop-off is at your Seoul hotel or any Seoul downtown location of your choice
Incheon Airport pickup or drop-off is available with an additional 100,000 KRW one-way transfer fee
If you need to reschedule, please contact us at least 2 days before the original reservation date

practicalAccordionItems.title: Vehicle and Group Size
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Vehicle assigned by group size and luggage volume
content: The vehicle type is matched to the exact number of passengers and luggage pieces
Please fill in the exact passenger count and luggage count when booking
Typical vehicles include sedans for 1 to 3 guests, mid-size SUVs for 4 to 5 guests, and Staria or Carnival vans for 6 to 9 guests
Larger groups may be split across multiple vehicles or quoted separately

practicalAccordionItems.title: 10-Hour Window and Overtime
content: The 10-hour window starts from your hotel pickup time
Airport pickup or drop-off, when added, is included inside the same 10 hours
Overtime is charged at 30,000 KRW per additional hour, paid in cash directly to the driver
Overtime is subject to driver availability and applicable hours of service rules

practicalAccordionItems.title: Extra Fees You Should Know About
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Province-crossing, airport transfer, and admission costs
content: Alpaca World or Legoland: additional 60,000 KRW for crossing the province line (Gangwon-do)
Incheon Airport pickup or drop-off: additional 100,000 KRW per one-way transfer
All admission fees, meals, and personal shopping are paid directly by guests
Optional driver gratuities are appreciated but not required

practicalAccordionItems.title: Weather policy
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Private format adapts well to changing conditions
content: On rainy days, the driver-guide can shift toward indoor stops (museums, Paju Outlets, Heyri Art Village)
Heavy snow may close the 1100 Highland-equivalent winter routes in Gangwon-do
DMZ access can be affected by military training schedules and may require a same-day route change
Final route adjustments are made together with the driver-guide on the day

practicalAccordionItems.title: What's included
practicalAccordionItems.preview: Vehicle and licensed driver-guide; admission and meals pay direct
content: Private vehicle (sedan, SUV, or van based on group size)
Licensed English-speaking driver-guide
Free hotel pickup and drop-off in Seoul downtown
Fuel and tolls for the standard route
All admission fees are not included; pay directly at each venue
Meals are not included
Personal shopping is not included
Driver gratuities are not included

seasonalVariations.name: Spring
seasonalVariations.description: Cherry blossoms across Seoul and Gapyeong; Garden of Morning Calm shifts into magnolia and azalea bloom.

seasonalVariations.name: Summer
seasonalVariations.description: Long daylight hours stretch the 10-hour window; expect humidity and possible monsoon rain in late June and July.

seasonalVariations.name: Autumn
seasonalVariations.description: Korea's strongest scenic season; Nami Island, Garden of Morning Calm, and Korean Folk Village all photograph beautifully.

seasonalVariations.name: Winter
seasonalVariations.description: Garden of Morning Calm hosts its famous Lighting Festival from December to mid-March; DMZ winters can be very cold and exposed.

bookingTrustItems.title: Licensed local operator
bookingTrustItems.description: Authorized Korean tour operator with full insurance

bookingTrustItems.title: Route specialists
bookingTrustItems.description: Hand-tuned itinerary, not a generic loop

bookingSupportSteps.title: 12-Hour Reminder
bookingSupportSteps.detail: Weather update and any route adjustments

bookingSupportSteps.title: Final Pickup Info
bookingSupportSteps.detail: Exact pickup time and driver contact

bookingSupportSteps.title: Day-of Route Notes
bookingSupportSteps.detail: Morning briefing based on live conditions

staticQuestions.question: How does this differ from a small-group bus tour to Nami or DMZ?
staticQuestions.answer: This is a private vehicle for your group only — flexible itinerary, hotel pickup, no shared schedule. Small-group bus tours follow fixed timing across multiple groups. Choose this if you want hotel pickup, a custom route mix (Gapyeong nature + DMZ + Everland or your own list), or pacing that fits seniors and young kids. Choose a fixed group tour if you're 1-2 travelers on a budget — private pricing is per vehicle, not per person.

staticQuestions.question: How does the 10-hour window work?
staticQuestions.answer: The clock starts at your Seoul hotel pickup time and runs continuously to drop-off — including driving time, stops, and any airport transfer if added. Overtime past 10 hours is 30,000 KRW per additional hour, paid in cash to the driver, and subject to driver availability. Plan stops with the driver-guide on the morning of the tour or send your priorities the night before.

staticQuestions.question: What if it rains?
staticQuestions.answer: The driver-guide will shift toward indoor stops on rainy days — Paju Premium Outlets, Heyri Art Village, museum stops, or Starfield Suwon. The DMZ portion of Route 2 can also be affected by military training schedules and may require a same-day route change. Final routing is confirmed with the driver-guide on the morning of the tour based on conditions.

staticQuestions.question: What kind of vehicle will I get?
staticQuestions.answer: Vehicle is matched to your party size and luggage at booking. Typical pairings are sedans for 1-3 guests, mid-size SUVs for 4-5 guests, and Hyundai Staria or Kia Carnival vans for 6-9 guests. Provide exact passenger and luggage counts when booking. Larger groups (10+) can be arranged as a multi-vehicle quote.

staticQuestions.question: What extra fees should I know about?
staticQuestions.answer: Province-line surcharges: Alpaca World or Legoland in Gangwon-do adds 60,000 KRW. Incheon Airport pickup or drop-off is 100,000 KRW per one-way transfer. All admission fees and meals are paid directly by guests at each venue (not included in the tour price). Driver gratuities are optional but appreciated for full-day service.

staticQuestions.question: Which Seoul areas qualify for free hotel pickup?
staticQuestions.answer: Free pickup covers the central Seoul downtown zone: Myeongdong, Hongdae, Dongdaemun, Insadong, Itaewon, and adjacent neighborhoods. Stays outside this zone (e.g. Gangnam east of Yangjae, Gimpo Airport area, far western Mapo) may incur a small additional pickup fee — confirmed at booking. Always send your hotel address when booking so the driver can pre-route.

staticQuestions.question: Is this a good choice for first-time visitors to Seoul & Suburbs?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes, but with a caveat: this format works best when you have a clear preference for one of the three preset routes (Gapyeong nature loop, DMZ + Paju, Everland + Folk Village) or specific stops in mind. First-timers without an opinion sometimes get more from a fixed small-group tour where the route is decided. The driver-guide can suggest a route on the morning if you're undecided.

staticQuestions.question: Is the walking difficult?
staticQuestions.answer: Mostly easy walking — this is a vehicle-based tour with the driver dropping you at each stop. Walking demand depends on the route: Nami Island has flat tree-lined paths (≈2 km perimeter); the Garden of Morning Calm has mild slopes; DMZ sites involve some uneven ground at the 3rd Tunnel and Imjingak. Everland and Folk Village involve more walking but the driver waits and you control pace.

staticQuestions.question: Is this tour suitable for families?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes — one of the easier Seoul-area formats for families. The private vehicle removes the bus-coordination problem with strollers and car seats, and the driver-guide can pause for snack breaks or pivot if a child is tired. Route 3 (Everland + Korean Folk Village) is the strongest family pick; Route 1 (Gapyeong) works for older kids; Route 2 (DMZ) is for teens and up only.

staticQuestions.question: Can older adults join comfortably?
staticQuestions.answer: Yes — this is one of the strongest senior-friendly formats available. The private vehicle, hotel pickup, and pacing flexibility let active seniors and lower-mobility seniors join comfortably. The driver-guide can drop closer to entrances on request, build in seated breaks, and skip uphill optionals (e.g. the Petite France hillside, Sky Park spiral stairs). Confirm specific mobility constraints at booking so the route can be tuned.

staticQuestions.question: What's the recommended minimum age?
staticQuestions.answer: All ages welcome. The private vehicle, flexible pacing, and hotel pickup make this one of the easier Seoul day-tour formats for very young children — bring car seats if needed (the driver can advise). Route 3 (Everland + Korean Folk Village) is the most family-friendly preset. For toddlers, the driver-guide can build in extra rest breaks at no penalty to your itinerary.

fix_passes.v12: P0+P1 — pickup_dropoff Schema A unification, routeFlowStops type-based, competing_products → internal slugs, anchor_poi_keys aligned
fix_passes.v13: P1.5 — pickup_dropoff Schema A.2 → A.1; practicalAccordionItems / routePhases / seasonalVariations unified to V4 canonical (no Tailwind in data)
fix_passes.v14: P2 — _publication uniform; duration formatting standardized; glanceItems Duration added where missing
fix_passes.v15: P3 round 1 — SEO trim. seo.pageTitle rewritten to ≤65 chars (was 14/25 over 70); seo.metaDescription rewritten to ≤168 chars (was 25/25 over 170). primaryKeywords and ogImage unchanged. Hero/OG images, POI verification, review imports, and routePhases enrichment deferred to later P3 rounds.

v17_schema_unification.description: Phase 1: Converted matching_profile scores from 1-5 int scale to 0-1 float scale to match the 3 Step 3 new tours. Mapping 1→0.20, 2→0.40, 3→0.60, 4→0.80, 5→1.00. Mechanical conversion preserves ordinal information; verified-fact recalibration happens in subsequent enhancement batches.

v17_batch7_enhancement.description: Batch 7 deep enhancement — private charter pair (Jeju + Seoul). Both tours have 4 route options as itineraryStops (East/West/South/Custom for Jeju; Gapyeong/DMZ-Paju/Everland-Folk/Custom for Seoul). Each route option enhanced with 1,000+ char descriptions weaving verified facts about constituent POIs into a coherent route narrative. matching_profile recalibrated to verified-fact 0-1 float scores using cross-route weighted averaging. private_tour_fit, customizable_route_fit, flexibility_fit set from None to 1.0. 9 new POIs added to KB (v1.9 → v1.10): udo_island, manjanggul_lava_tube, sanbangsan_mountain, sangumburi_crater, yakcheonsa_temple, garden_of_morning_calm, petite_france, everland, korean_folk_village_yongin. DMZ POIs and Nami Island deferred to Batch 8.

_score_audit._methodology: 0-1 float scale per Phase 1 standard. Both tours are private 9-10hr charters with 4 route options (East/West/South/Custom for Jeju; Gapyeong/DMZ-Paju/Everland-Folk/Custom for Seoul). Scores are weighted averages across the recommended routes, with extreme-outlier dimensions weighted toward the realistic middle (e.g. UNESCO score reflects average across routes — Route 1 maxes UNESCO, but weighted average ~0.65). Charter-format dimensions (private_tour_fit, customizable_route_fit, flexibility_fit) are set to 1.0 by definition. Walking_level and indoor_ratio are time-weighted averages across the typical day.

private_tour_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Both tours are per-vehicle private charters by definition. Was previously None (unset).

customizable_route_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Three recommended routes plus a fully custom option. Both tours fully customizable. Was previously None.

flexibility_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Driver-guide adapts pacing, order, lunch, optional add-ons (Udo ferry, Smart Queue). Was previously None.

small_group_fit.reasoning: Verified — these are PRIVATE charters not small-group. 0.15 reflects that a 1-vehicle-of-9 booking still functions as a small private group, but the product type is private not small_group.

bus_fit.reasoning: Verified — private charter = sedan/SUV/van, never bus. 0.05 reflects near-zero bus fit (only the very largest groups of 10+ would step up to a coach format).

unesco_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — modest upward calibration. Route 3 visits Korean Folk Village (Jultagi tightrope is UNESCO ICH, but the village itself isn't UNESCO World Heritage). Custom Route can include Suwon Hwaseong (UNESCO 1997). Weighted ~0.30 — modest UNESCO content compared to a Jeju or Gyeongju trip.

iconic_landmark_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — Nami Island, Garden of Morning Calm, DMZ 3rd Tunnel, Everland T Express are all iconic landmarks of the Seoul-area touring circuit. 0.85 calibrated.

first_time_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — for a first-time Seoul visitor with kids, Route 1 (Gapyeong) or Route 3 (Everland) deliver maximum recognizable content. 0.85 calibrated up from 0.80.

scenic_level.reasoning: Verified — Gapyeong nature loop is high scenic; DMZ is institutional rather than scenic; Everland is theme-park visual rather than scenic. Average ~0.80 maintained.

walking_level.reasoning: VERIFIED — was significantly underestimated. Route 1: 3 km Nami walk + Morning Calm 1.5-2hr garden + Petite France slopes (~0.55). Route 2: 3rd Tunnel ramp + Paju Outlets walking (~0.50). Route 3: Everland 5-10 km hilly OR Folk Village 5-7 km flat (~0.75). Average ~0.55, materially higher than previous 0.40.

indoor_ratio.reasoning: VERIFIED — weighted across routes. Route 1: low indoor (~0.20 — Petite France interiors + Morning Calm cafés). Route 2: moderate (~0.45 — 3rd Tunnel underground + Paju Outlets covered shopping). Route 3: moderate (~0.30 Everland + 0.20 Folk Village = ~0.25). Average ~0.40, lower than previous 0.50.

weather_sensitivity.reasoning: VERIFIED — calibrated up from 0.40. Route 1 (Gapyeong outdoor gardens + island) has high weather sensitivity. Route 2 has indoor DMZ + Paju Outlets fallback. Route 3 Everland is outdoor theme park. Average ~0.50.

shopping_fit.reasoning: VERIFIED — only Route 2 (Paju Outlets) has flagship shopping. Routes 1, 3 have minimal shopping. Custom Route can max if specifically requested. Weighted ~0.70, materially lower than the previous 1.0 which assumed Route 2 always selected.

family_fit.reasoning: Verified — Routes 1 and 3 are best-in-class for families with kids. Route 2 less so but still doable. Maintained at 1.0.

premium_fit.reasoning: Verified — private vehicle + flexible itinerary + driver-guide = top of premium scale. Maintained at 1.0.

value_for_money_fit.reasoning: Verified — per-vehicle pricing is excellent value for groups of 4-9 but expensive for solo travelers. Slight markdown to 0.55.

storytelling_fit.reasoning: Verified — driver-guide narrates throughout. 0.80 maintained — slightly less rich narrative than Jeju (geology) but DMZ history is a strong narrative if Route 2.
